User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Block dashboard surfaces from indexing
Disallow: /buyer
Disallow: /seller
Disallow: /dealer
Disallow: /service
Disallow: /admin
Disallow: /onboarding
Disallow: /checkout

# Sitemap is generated by the sitemap edge function and proxied at /sitemap.xml
# (Vercel rewrite or Supabase function URL)
